mapper.sql: sfw.id, sfw.income_period, sfw.work_card, sfw.employee_name, sfw.employee_category, sfw.division_contract_flag, sfw.generation_differentiation_flag, sfw.department, sfw.administrative_office, sfw.distribution_method, sfw.bank_account, sfw.bank_name, sfw.accessment_form, sfw.target_performance_pay, sfw.production_factor, sfw.quality_factor, sfw.assessment_coefficient, round(sfw.monthly_performance_salary,2) as monthly_performance_salary, round(sfw.allocate_performance_pay,2) as allocate_performance_pay, round(sfw.pre_tax_withheld,2) as pre_tax_withheld, round(sfw.wages_payable,2) as wages_payable, round(sfw.after_tax_withheld,2) as after_tax_withheld, round(sfw.net_payment,2) as net_payment, sfw.commit_flag, sfw.frozen_flag, sfw.attribute1, sfw.attribute2, sfw.attribute3, sfw.attribute4, sfw.attribute5, sfw.create_time, sfw.create_by, sfw.update_time, sfw.update_by, sfw.se_id, sfw.enabled_flag, sfw.grant_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.income_period as ${tAlias}_income_period, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.employee_category as ${tAlias}_employee_category, ${tAlias}.division_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_division_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.generation_differentiation_flag as ${tAlias}_generation_differentiation_flag, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.administrative_office as ${tAlias}_administrative_office, ${tAlias}.distribution_method as ${tAlias}_distribution_method, ${tAlias}.bank_account as ${tAlias}_bank_account, ${tAlias}.bank_name as ${tAlias}_bank_name, ${tAlias}.accessment_form as ${tAlias}_accessment_form, ${tAlias}.target_performance_pay as ${tAlias}_target_performance_pay, ${tAlias}.production_factor as ${tAlias}_production_factor, ${tAlias}.quality_factor as ${tAlias}_quality_factor, ${tAlias}.assessment_coefficient as ${tAlias}_assessment_coefficient, ${tAlias}.monthly_performance_salary as ${tAlias}_monthly_performance_salary, ${tAlias}.allocate_performance_pay as ${tAlias}_allocate_performance_pay, ${tAlias}.pre_tax_withheld as ${tAlias}_pre_tax_withheld, ${tAlias}.wages_payable as ${tAlias}_wages_payable, ${tAlias}.after_tax_withheld as ${tAlias}_after_tax_withheld, ${tAlias}.net_payment as ${tAlias}_net_payment, ${tAlias}.commit_flag as ${tAlias}_commit_flag, ${tAlias}.frozen_flag as ${tAlias}_frozen_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.se_id as ${tAlias}_se_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.grant_flag as ${tAlias}_grant_flag

select
, (select isnull(pe.name, '') from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pe on fu.employee_id = pe.id and fu.id = sfw.update_by where fu.enabled_flag =1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1) as update_by_str from swm_floating_wage sfw
mapper.insert: insert into swm_floating_wage (income_period, work_card, employee_name, employee_category, division_contract_flag, generation_differentiation_flag, department, administrative_office, distribution_method, bank_account, bank_name, accessment_form, target_performance_pay, production_factor, quality_factor, assessment_coefficient, monthly_performance_salary, allocate_performance_pay, pre_tax_withheld, wages_payable, after_tax_withheld, net_payment, commit_flag, frozen_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, se_id, enabled_flag, grant_flag) values (#{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{distributionMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accessmentForm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{productionFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{qualityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{assessmentCoefficient,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{monthlyPerformanceSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{allocatePerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{preTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{wagesPayable,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{afterTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{netPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{commitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{frozenFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag, jdbcType = BIT}, #{grantFlag, jdbcType=BIT})
mapper.update: update swm_floating_wage set enabled_flag = 0, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and frozen_flag = 0 and enabled_flag = 1
mapper.select: select top 1 income_period from swm_floating_wage where frozen_flag = 0 order by id desc
mapper.update: update swm_floating_wage set income_period = #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_category = #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, division_contract_flag = #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, generation_differentiation_flag = #{generationDifferentiationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, administrative_office = #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, distribution_method = #{distributionMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, accessment_form = #{accessmentForm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, target_performance_pay = #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, production_factor = #{productionFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, quality_factor = #{qualityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, assessment_coefficient = #{assessmentCoefficient,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, monthly_performance_salary = #{monthlyPerformanceSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, allocate_performance_pay = #{allocatePerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pre_tax_withheld = #{preTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, wages_payable = #{wagesPayable,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, after_tax_withheld = #{afterTaxWithheld,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, net_payment = #{netPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, commit_flag = #{commitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, frozen_flag = #{frozenFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, se_id = #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag, jdbcType=BIT}, grant_flag = #{grantFlag, jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select top 1 sfw.income_period from swm_floating_wage sfw where sfw.enabled_flag = 1 order by id desc
mapper.update: UPDATE sfw SET allocate_performance_pay = case when sfwi.allocate_performance_pay is not null then sfwi.allocate_performance_pay else sfw.allocate_performance_pay end, pre_tax_withheld = case when sfwi.pre_tax_withheld is not null then sfwi.pre_tax_withheld else sfw.pre_tax_withheld end, after_tax_withheld = case when sfwi.after_tax_withheld is not null then sfwi.after_tax_withheld else sfw.after_tax_withheld end, production_factor = case when sfwi.production_factor is not null then sfwi.production_factor else sfw.production_factor end, quality_factor = case when sfwi.quality_factor is not null then sfwi.quality_factor else sfw.quality_factor end, assessment_coefficient = case when sfwi.assessment_coefficient is not null then sfwi.assessment_coefficient else sfw.assessment_coefficient end, update_time = getDate(), update_by = sfwi.update_by, commit_flag = case when sfwi.allocate_performance_pay is not null then 1 else sfw.commit_flag end, commit_time = case when sfwi.allocate_performance_pay is not null then getdate() else sfw.commit_time end FROM swm_floating_wage_interface sfwi join swm_floating_wage sfw on sfwi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} AND RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sfw.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sfwi.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND sfwi.employee_id != - 1 AND sfwi.data_status = 'T' AND sfwi.income_period = sfw.income_period and isnull(sfw.frozen_flag, 0) = 0

UPDATE sfw set wages_payable = sfw.allocate_performance_pay + sfw.pre_tax_withheld, net_payment = sfw.allocate_performance_pay + sfw.pre_tax_withheld + sfw.after_tax_withheld from swm_floating_wage_interface sfwi join swm_floating_wage sfw on sfwi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} AND RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sfw.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sfwi.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND sfwi.employee_id != - 1 AND sfwi.data_status = 'T' AND sfwi.income_period = sfw.income_period
mapper.select: select count(1) from swm_floating_wage sfw where sfw.enabled_flag = 1 and sfw.frozen_flag = 1 and sfw.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update sfw set allocate_performance_pay = #{allocatePerformancePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, wages_payable = #{allocatePerformancePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL} + sfw.pre_tax_withheld, net_payment = #{allocatePerformancePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL} + sfw.pre_tax_withheld + sfw.after_tax_withheld, commit_flag = 1, commit_time = getdate() from swm_floating_wage sfw where id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT} and enabled_flag = 1 and frozen_flag = 0
mapper.select: select case when exists (select 1 from swm_floating_wage sfw where sfw.enabled_flag = 1 and sfw.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR}) then 1 else 0 end
mapper.update: UPDATE sfw set monthly_performance_salary = sfw.target_performance_pay * sfw.production_factor * sfw.quality_factor * sfw.assessment_coefficient from swm_floating_wage_interface sfwi join swm_floating_wage sfw on sfwi.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} AND RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sfw.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( sfwi.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND sfwi.employee_id != - 1 AND sfwi.data_status = 'T' AND sfwi.income_period = sfw.income_period
